description: A tense standoff unfolds in the Playground as Sif and Vin-Tak pursue Skye and May. May coaches Skye to control her powers in a containment cell while Fitz, Bobbi, and Mack engineer a counterattack. In the chaos, Bobbi and Fitz manage to neutralize and memory-wipe Vin-Tak, while Sif finally breaches the cell, prompting Skye to KO herself to prevent further destruction.

transcript.line: Okay. Listen to me. Just me. We can do this. You can do this.
I can't. I can't make it stop.
You will control your emotions, just like we practiced.
I can't make it stop. Everyone is at risk.
Just focus. Skye, look at me. Focus. It'll stop.
You knew you couldn't stop me. So what was the point?
